title: alexs caves Delight ( Farmer's Delight & alexs caves Add-on)
description: a simple addition to "Farmer's Delight" and "alexs caves", adding some food
body:
a simple addition to "Farmer's Delight" and "alexis caves", adding some food 

Adds some sushi and cakes for the biomes of the mod 
and also several types of icing for cakes =)
and sushi can also be overcooked
